title: matricaria macrophylla
intro: Matricaria macrophylla, also known as large leaf chamomile, is a plant species in the daisy family that is native to Europe and Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and calming effects, making it useful in treating digestive issues, skin irritations, and anxiety-related problems. The health benefits of Matricaria macrophylla include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation and pain, and promoting relaxation and better sleep. The plant can be used to prepare teas, infusions, and extracts, which are commonly used in herbal medicine and traditional remedies.
